description: Composition Washed and frayed blue jeans made of 100% cotton, has two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with embroidery and stitch detailing, brand patch printed on the waistband and a metal zipper and button closure Fitting Low rise; Slim Fit Wash care Wash inside out using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Guranteed to make you feel wonderful, this pair of washed and frayed denims from spykar is a great addition to your wardrobe. The slim fit and washed look gives you that stylish edge, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day long. Pair it with t-shirts and canvas shoes. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 44" Height: 6.3”, Waist: 32”, Hips: 40”
